title: stelis melanoxantha
intro: Stelis melanoxantha, also known as the Yellow-Banded Orchid, is a species of orchid found in the tropical regions of Central and South America. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis melanoxantha include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
